warnings: Snapshot is read-only; Ariadne did not run GSD headless, auto, install, update, worktree, or model commands.

raw.help:
GSD v2.59.0 — Get Shit Done

Usage: gsd [options] [message...]

Options:
  --mode <text|json|rpc|mcp> Output mode (default: interactive)
  --print, -p              Single-shot print mode
  --continue, -c           Resume the most recent session
  --worktree, -w [name]    Start in an isolated worktree (auto-named if omitted)
  --model <id>             Override model (e.g. claude-opus-4-6)
  --no-session             Disable session persistence
  --extension <path>       Load additional extension
  --tools <a,b,c>          Restrict available tools
  --list-models [search]   List available models and exit
  --version, -v            Print version and exit
  --help, -h               Print this help and exit

Subcommands:
  config                   Re-run the setup wizard
  install <source>         Install a package/extension source
  remove <source>          Remove an installed package source
  list                     List installed package sources
  update                   Update GSD to the latest version
  sessions                 List and resume a past session
  worktree <cmd>           Manage worktrees (list, merge, clean, remove)
  auto [args]              Run auto-mode without TUI (pipeable)
  headless [cmd] [args]    Run /gsd commands without TUI (default: auto)

Run gsd <subcommand> --help for subcommand-specific help.
